items.description: Import path missing or dependency not installed.
items.fix: Verify file path or install missing dependency.

items.description: Prisma client not generated or output path mismatched.
items.fix: Run prisma generate and confirm output path.

items.description: Tailwind config mismatch or wrong version syntax.
items.fix: Verify Tailwind version and update @apply usage.

items.description: Wrong root directory or build command skipped real build.
items.fix: Check project root and build command configuration.

items.description: Build output directory not produced or misconfigured.
items.fix: Confirm framework preset and output directory.

items.description: Auth runtime missing required environment variable.
items.fix: Set NEXTAUTH_URL and redeploy.

items.description: DB connection or schema mismatch at runtime.
items.fix: Verify DATABASE_URL and schema compatibility.

items.description: Serverless packaging missing build artifacts.
items.fix: Ensure build output is included in deployment.

items.pattern: Type error: Route .* does not match
items.description: Next.js App Router page/layout type mismatch after upgrade.
items.fix: Update page component signature to match expected Next.js types.

items.description: Server-only import used in client component.
items.fix: Add 'use server' directive or move import to server component.

items.description: Serverless function exceeded execution time limit.
items.fix: Check for missing await, large DB queries, or increase timeout in vercel.json.

items.description: Package uses Node.js APIs not available in Edge Runtime.
items.fix: Switch to nodejs runtime in route config or replace incompatible package.

items.description: Database table missing — migration not applied or wrong schema.
items.fix: Run pending migrations or verify DATABASE_URL points to correct database.

items.description: NextAuth session token invalid or NEXTAUTH_SECRET changed.
items.fix: Verify NEXTAUTH_SECRET matches across environments. Clear cookies if rotated.

items.description: npm install fails due to incompatible package version requirements.
items.fix: Check which packages conflict, pin compatible versions, or use --legacy-peer-deps as last resort.

items.description: Tailwind v4 @import rules not properly configured in CSS entrypoint.
items.fix: Ensure @import 'tailwindcss' is at the top of your main CSS file before other imports.

items.description: Next.js App Router metadata export conflict in layout and page files.
items.fix: Define metadata only in layout.tsx, or use generateMetadata() in pages. Do not export metadata from both.

items.description: Prisma schema mismatch due to unapplied migrations or schema changes.
items.fix: Run 'npx prisma migrate deploy' or 'npx prisma db push' to sync schema with database.

items.pattern: new row violates row-level security policy
items.description: Supabase RLS policy denying INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE operation for authenticated user.
items.fix: Check RLS policies on the table and verify user role/claim matches the policy condition.

items.description: Vercel serverless function exceeded 10-second free tier timeout limit.
items.fix: Optimize function (move heavy work to background jobs, cache results) or upgrade to Pro plan for longer timeout.

items.description: ESM/CJS module interop error when mixing import/require or using .mjs/.cjs incorrectly.
items.fix: Ensure all imports/requires are consistent: use 'import' for ESM files, require for CJS. Check package.json 'type' field.

items.pattern: 'use client' is not defined|'use server' is not allowed here
items.description: React Server Component directive missing or placed in wrong location.
items.fix: Add 'use client' at the top of client components or 'use server' at the top of server functions.

items.description: Git merge conflict in lock files (package-lock.json, yarn.lock, etc.) during deployment.
items.fix: Resolve merge conflict in lock file, remove conflicting markers, re-run 'npm install' or 'yarn install'.

items.description: Build-time environment variable missing when running build script.
items.fix: Define environment variable in .env.local (dev) or CI/CD secrets (prod), then run build again.

items.description: TypeScript strict null check failure due to missing null guard or type assertion.
items.fix: Add null check, use optional chaining (?.), non-null assertion (!), or Type narrowing (if checks).
